arts.ttl: Mark Sykes makes Bristol City 'confidence' point after goal in Reds' draw with Sheffield United
arts.sum: Mark Sykes has admitted he could feel the "confidence" that his Bristol City teammates were playing with in the first half of their draw with Sheffield United, before being introduced in place of Max Bird at the break. Although they made life difficult for themselves, the former Oxford United man felt a draw was the least City's display warranted having dominated large periods of the game, before and after his introduction at half-time.
